title: PDF Q&A Bot Project Scope
concept: Defining the goal: answering user questions grounded in a local set of PDF documents.

exercises.prompt: What is the main use of a PDF Q&A bot?

options.text: To answer questions based on PDF documents
To convert PDFs into text files

exercises.explain: The main use of a PDF Q&A bot is to answer questions based on PDF documents.

cards.title: What is a PDF Q&A Bot?
cards.body: A PDF Q&A bot helps people find answers to their questions from a set of PDF documents. It can quickly search through lots of information.

cards.title: Defining the Goal
cards.body: The goal of a PDF Q&A bot is to accurately answer user questions based on the information found within specific PDF documents.

cards.title: Like a Helpful Librarian
cards.body: Imagine asking a librarian a question. They help you find the right book and answer your question based on what’s written in it! The PDF Q&A bot does the same for PDFs.

cards.title: Example Question and Answer
cards.body: If a user asks, 'What are the main topics in this PDF?', the bot will look through the document and list the main topics.

cards.title: Myth: All Questions are Simple
cards.body: Some people think any question is easy for a bot. In reality, the bot needs to read and understand complex information from PDFs.

cards.title: Visualizing Our Goal
cards.body: We want our bot to connect users to the right information in PDFs.

exercises.prompt: What does the PDF Q&A bot need to do?
exercises.explain: The PDF Q&A bot needs to answer questions using information found in PDF documents.

exercises.prompt: A PDF Q&A bot can answer questions about any topic, regardless of the PDFs it has access to. True or False?
exercises.explain: False. The bot can only answer questions related to the topics covered in the specific PDFs it has access to.

exercises.prompt: The primary goal of the PDF Q&A bot is to answer __________ based on the information in PDF documents.
exercises.sentence: The primary goal of the PDF Q&A bot is to answer user questions based on the information in PDF documents.
exercises.explain: The bot's main purpose is to answer user questions based on the information from PDFs.

exercises.prompt: Which statement is correct about a PDF Q&A bot?

options.text: It can only read images in PDFs.
It answers questions using text from PDF documents.

exercises.explain: The correct statement is that the bot answers questions using text from PDF documents, which is its main function.

exercises.prompt: Why is it important for a PDF Q&A bot to understand the specific PDFs it uses?

options.text: To ensure it provides accurate answers.
To create new PDFs for the user.
To format documents nicely for reading.
To convert all PDFs into word documents.

exercises.explain: It's important for a PDF Q&A bot to understand the specific PDFs it uses, so it can provide accurate answers based on the information within those documents.
